title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways in which businesses and individuals can contribute to social responsibility, then decide which two are most important.
options: Employee volunteering initiatives during work hours
Ethical sourcing and supply chain transparency
Reducing environmental impact through sustainable business practices

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to charities and social responsibility. Discuss the following ways in which businesses and individuals can contribute to social responsibility, then decide which two are most important. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important.
